initiatives.name: Vallejo Housing Justice Coalition
initiatives.description: We believe that housing is a human right, We envision a city with housing that is affordable and reflects the needs of our community!

initiatives.name: Vallejo Unity Garden
initiatives.description: We are a community garden and educational space working to be a model and resource for sustainable local food production in the hands of the people.

initiatives.name: Vallejo Free Store
initiatives.description: just a humble little free store that's supported by our community. we're part of the @foodisfreesolano network of distribution sites.

initiatives.name: The Sean Monterrosa Project
initiatives.description: The Sean Monterrosa Project (TSMP) is a movement for justice, accountability, and community empowerment, founded in response to the police killing of Sean Monterrosa on June 2, 2020, in Vallejo, California.
